_comment: Rename this file to webfn.config.json to use it.
_comment_outputDir: Directory where fetched files, screenshots, and metadata will be saved.
_comment_provider: Search engine to use for queries. Supported: 'google', 'duckduckgo'.
_comment_mdEngine: Markdown parser for converting HTML to Markdown. Supported: 'defuddle', 'turndown'.
_comment_timeout: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for page navigation and fetching.
_comment_delay: Time in milliseconds to wait AFTER the page has loaded before capturing content/screenshot.
_comment_results: Default number of search results to fetch and collect.
_comment_waitUntil: Puppeteer wait condition for page loads. Supported: 'networkidle2', 'domcontentloaded'.
_comment_engine: Browser execution engine. Supported: 'chrome' (local headless), 'lightpanda' (local fast engine), 'cloudflare' (remote serverless edge rendering).
_comment_cloudflareAccountId: Your Cloudflare Account ID. Required ONLY if engine is set to 'cloudflare'. (It is safer to set this in your .env file).
_comment_cloudflareApiToken: Your Cloudflare API Token. Required ONLY if engine is set to 'cloudflare'. (It is safer to set this in your .env file).
